permafrost.name: Permafrost
permafrost.description: One disclosed flask begins chilled and thaws after a completed potion.

brittle_glass.name: Brittle Glass
brittle_glass.description: Invalid pours briefly add one point of visible enemy pressure; no flask is destroyed.

rising_tide.name: Rising Tide
rising_tide.description: In three moves, disclosed eligible flask tops rotate only when the solver accepts the result.

abyssal_ink.name: Abyssal Ink
abyssal_ink.description: One disclosed top layer is dimmed while selection outlines and color labels remain visible.
